title: Cancel the sharing of an audience
content:
Use this endpoint to stop the sharing of an audience with advertisers. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path|/v1.2/dmp/custom_audience/share/cancel/| /v1.3/dmp/custom_audience/share/cancel/ |Request parameter data type|`shared_advertiser_id`: number
`advertiser_id`: number
`custom_audience_id`: number|`shared_advertiser_id`: string
`advertiser_id`: string
`custom_audience_id`: string| ``` ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/dmp/custom_audience/share/cancel/ **Method** POST **Header** ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| | Content-Type {Required} | string | The content type of the request.
Allowed value: `"application/json"`.| ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |custom_audience_id {Required}|string|Custom audiences that you want to stop sharing.| |shared_advertiser_id{Optional}|string|Advertisers that you want to stop sharing audiences with. Only set it when you want to cancel the audiences you shared with others before.| |advertiser_id{Required}|string| Operator advertiser ID.| ``` ### Examples ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl -H "Access-Token:xxx" -H "Content-Type:application/json" -X POST \ -d '{ "custom_audience_id": "CUSTOM_AUDIENCE_ID", "shared_advertiser_id": "SHARED_ADVERTISER_ID", "advertiser_id": "ADVERTISER_ID" }' \ https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/dmp/custom_audience/share/cancel/ (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number|Return code, see [Appendix-Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |message |string|Return message, see [Appendix-Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |data |object|Returned data.| |request_id |string|The log id of the request, which uniquely identifies a request. | ``` ### Example ``` xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "message": "OK", "code": 0, "data": {} } (/code); ```
